productDisplayName: John Players Men Printed Red T-Shirt
description: Composition Red T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with black tipping, full sleeves with black ribbed cuffs, stitch detailing, and flock print with embroidery on the front Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron Up the funky factor in style this party season with this T-shirt from john players. The embroidery and flock print combination on the front gives a holiday feeling to this tee. Team it with jeans and casual shoes.
